title: Monotonic Exponentials
summary: This page covers combining sinusoids using phasor diagrams and MATLAB, expressing sinusoids in terms of exponentials using Euler's formula, and introduces sketching of monotonic exponential signals. It demonstrates how C cos(ω₀t + θ) can be decomposed into cosine and sine components, and presents the Euler identities for cosine and sine in terms of complex exponentials.
